Nav is extremely polite, helpful and makes a mean pizza.  Thanks Nav for being you!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Alec Ferguson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLGrXY7Ru4-kSChM_EoLMCLYDjpOHy0VVQ0forjMRS6Ek_q4A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Girlfriend went in to get a deck of cards. When scanned the price was $3.35. He cleared it and put in $6. I then went in and asked him how much the cards were. He said “$6” then I asked him to scan the card that came up as “$3.35”. Then showed me on his phone the cards were “worth” $6… I have no words… saw the guy in front of me overcharged too. He also
called him on it and had a refund. Overall, didn’t get the cards.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Philip Stubbs","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXjvw4QnClmUQ6G6AylyEO0ZK_F8Gz_b9XnV0lgQ9-FsLwmjL6p=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"My work partner Donald and I went to this gas station / store  to buy some Windex. On a return business trip we stopped there to get gasoline. Both people that work in the store were staring at us through their plate glass window. I went inside to purchase gasoline because they kept shutting off the pump. I went inside and paid for $40 in gasoline. My work partner  Donald went  to use the washroom and when he came out and exited the store the employee came out and falsely accused him of shoplifting. We are both bonded security guards . We are both looking into suing them for defamation and slander.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Lisa Rhodes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWfI2cvAnmWQvYZaS9ZcwVJGFj7fMIgTuc9-97tZqAQlBHNcuy9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Unfortunately our lovely little Greenwood Grocers here in town was out of vanilla ice cream so I went to Canco. Canco charged $13.26 for a container of ice cream that you can purchase anywhere for $7.99. I'm all for a business making a profit but this is just plain price gouging! So very disappointed in our local Canco.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Nancy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWxZIuiiJzqSK_0oC_udLSNFdmEgBh8tYLyolKLX-Z-1H-ciOE=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Excellent pizza
Horrible laundry machines , Over Priced and clothes didn’t dry and I put extra time on it .
Be sure you watch how much you are paying for your items today I was charged $10   For a butter tart and a small pack of powdered doughnuts shouldn't cost more than $3 neither should the butter tart🙄I put them back these prices are ridiculous be careful what you buy there and make sure you watch what he's ringing up and the cost of what you're buying","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Donovan Bienvenu (BENDY)","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIMrmqwVUVUFoepN0ZBsuSO8cHvZHG5oYVKqRFlVSfUwIN2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Lot's of good snack's.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Atriarch Media","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKxCz0bb6DN2lWvODm15O3BMUW4oC5_yrPXEnhCY1auhjnziQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"When people order takeout, the business should take down the customers phone number (and their name). I placed an order for pizza, waited 15, then drove 30 minutes to pick it up. Found out it was given to someone else who just said it was theirs...it should be a standard these days to at least check the customers name before they hand it over. 2 hours wasted and no food.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Angel Willard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXnAI22unb8c5jFV3tzokoof812wnKeRkQ0qIa4SqLqoZBAGik=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"The only thing that's changed thats impacted alot of people in this small town is canco closing the laundry service down.","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Smitty Smith","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKlh7AdcPmJf-E2MmX_l9Rv0YzhkNyIGpxMpKBvSNkwUb0h6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had to redo my roof this year and Trail Roofing by far was the best option. Great communication, very hard working crew, respectful of time and were able to work around my schedule. Plus great pricing/value.

They installed a new roof with torch on, new ventilation, along with new fascia and soffiting.

100% will recommend these guys for anyone's roofing needs.

Thank you again Trail Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBP3tDZq3_k4Y2E4gYPL9I0&fid=0x0:0xb723eae649520729"],"When":"2025-8-19"},{"Name":"Aaron McQueen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIuDeJn21N8K0o8EViyI48f9rRqA1FlylXpZIswGeHZAr9zEg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Had a tree fall on my roof and break the overhang on 6 trusses. Trail Roofing inspected the same morning and repaired the trusses and roofing on the weekend. Very impressed to have all the damage and hole in my roof repaired just 1 day after the power was restored. Royce and his crew are very experienced, efficient and did high quality work. Trail Roofing has always given me very reasonable prices. Highly recommended.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Aaron F","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIt17sz09FkPEHYnAjDv-S2eyaqMujGJMk1LRXNU2EFa8AFjQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thought my roof was leaking. Called trail roofing and they came out right away to have a look and provide a reasonable quote. I would definitely recommend them for anyone looking for a roof replacement or repair.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"haylcroz","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIjVi7HCprdbZLcceFo5VKRsJ-xTyDzfMv556pWBxM399edeg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a roof leak due to an old venting pipe. Royce and his team responded to the phone straight away and were able to stop by the same day and make a permanent fix. The the team was polite, efficient, effective, and a fair price for work done. I 100% recommend and will use them if we ever need more work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Winter Jones","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJ_BVyrj30wlQyKWlo-dus9CIKlyqMVmdEUg_5ti3n7KPQIRQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"If I could give negative stars, I would. I was in the process of purchasing a home in Trail and needed a roof inspection. I contacted Trail Roofing, stipulated that I was willing and able to pay for the service. I was told that an inspection could take place within a couple of days. The day after I called Trail Roofing, I received a voice mail from Jackie and returned her call. She stated that they would not complete a physical inspection but instead, looked at photos online and deemed that the house I wanted to buy required a new roof. I contacted a different roofing contractor in Trail who conducted a physical inspection and told me the roof is in good shape and requires repairs. I was quoted $1,260 for those repairs. Trail Roofing: you are dishonest!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bob MCQUEEN","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV3dZptup1I2UsFnrnL2LpQKkfaq4WXnFThyMAKrGC1yZewCzw9=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After waiting a year for another contractor who was a no-show, I contacted Trail Roofing.  They gave a fair estimate, with a quick timeline. They started the job when they said they would, and met their estimated time of 3 days for strip down and install.  That was pretty impressive for our four separate roofs.  Very quick and I considered good quality.  They were safety conscious, kept the job site clean daily, and had a big and experienced crew for the job.  I downloaded a WCB clearance letter which said they had WorkSafe BC insurance coverage.  One of my concerns was poor roof venting which had caused ice dams in recent winters.  I liked the vents they used, and a bonus realized the vents also helped in hot summer weather to somewhat cool the roof.  I have no problem in recommending Trail Roofing.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Heidi Muller","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLgd329NwbLgPAgrRTHIQ1kn0ljLAuq4kGZtDSWxma77CgrdQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The Trail roofing crew were professional, thorough and tidy. They were quick to schedule my roof in and had it all completed in less than then 3 days even over Kootenay pass in Creston.  They were innovative and repaired and patched the parts of the roof with problems. Thank you for your excellent work, knowledge and superior skills.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Karen Millard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVLVa_w69lN1uiV4r4jXJ1SmvqRB5y9Qai7j0TVbTb1u0BfyeQDRg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"These people were incredible,professional,and a pleasure to have here.
The roof is beyond anything I hoped for.
The work and the crew were spectacular.","Images":null,"When":""}]
